Why Vigyan.prep?

Everything you need to crack IISER, NISER, and top research institute exams

Curated Question Banks

500+ hand-picked past-year questions with detailed solutions.

Adaptive Test Series

AI-powered mock tests mirroring the exact exam pattern of IAT and NEST.

Research-Level Depth

Content designed by researchers and alumni from IISER, IISc, and NISER.

Peer Community

Join 10,000+ aspirants discussing strategies and sharing notes.

Structured Study Plans

Week-by-week schedules tailored for IAT, NEST, and IISc exams.

Instant Doubt Resolution

Expert panel answers within hours. Never stay stuck.
